description: Style NoteLook daper in these shirts from french connection. Button up and stand to attention in these checked, striped, plain, casual and formal shirts, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Style these shirts with formal pants or jeans and up your style quotient. Product DetailsBeige shirt, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, pockets on the front with flap button closure and a curved hem Material and Care100% cottonWash with similar coloursIron on reverse sideSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L
